title: Shrimp & Chorizo Skillet (Hot Appetizer, 8 oz)
steps: Heat olive oil in a skillet; sauté garlic until fragrant.
Add chorizo, cook until lightly crisp.
Add shrimp and bell peppers; season with paprika, salt, and pepper.
Cook until shrimp are opaque and tender.
Finish with lemon juice and parsley.

title: Veal Chop Milanese
steps: Dredge veal in flour, dip in eggs, coat with breadcrumbs and Parmesan.
Pan-fry in olive oil until golden and cooked through.
Season with salt & pepper, serve with lemon wedges.

title: Roasted Monkfish, Saffron Tomato Broth
steps: Roast monkfish fillets in olive oil until opaque.
Sauté garlic and onion until soft, add tomatoes, saffron, and wine; simmer.
Blend lightly for broth consistency; season with salt and pepper.

title: Grilled Polenta Cakes, Mushroom Ragout (V)
steps: Grill polenta cakes until golden.
Sauté shallots and garlic in olive oil; add mushrooms and thyme.
Deglaze with vegetable stock; simmer until thickened.

title: Broccoli Rabe
steps: Blanch broccoli rabe in salted water 2–3 minutes; shock in ice water.
Sauté garlic and red pepper flakes in olive oil.
Toss broccoli rabe with oil and season.

title: Roasted Cherry Tomatoes
steps: Toss tomatoes with olive oil, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Roast at 400°F until soft and slightly caramelized.
Garnish with fresh basil.

title: Lemon Risotto
steps: Sauté onion in olive oil until translucent.
Add rice; toast lightly.
Gradually add stock, stirring constantly, until rice is creamy and tender.
Finish with butter, Parmesan, and lemon zest; adjust seasoning.

title: Almond Semolina Cake
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F; grease pans.
Mix dry ingredients; combine with wet ingredients until smooth.
Pour into pans; bake until golden and set.
Cool slightly; optionally drizzle with glaze.

title: Baked Escargot, Garlic Parsley Butter (Hot Appetizer, 8 oz)
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F.
Combine butter, garlic, parsley, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Place escargot in individual shells or mini dishes; top with garlic-parsley butter.
Bake until butter is bubbling and fragrant, ~10–12 minutes.

title: Beef Wellington (portion-cut)
steps: Sear beef on all sides; brush with Dijon mustard.
Sauté mushrooms and shallots in butter until moisture evaporates; cool.
Wrap beef and mushroom mixture in puff pastry; seal edges.
Brush with egg wash; bake at 400°F until golden, internal ~130°F.

title: Cider-Braised Chicken Thighs
steps: Brown chicken in butter and olive oil; remove from pan.
Sauté onions and carrots; deglaze with cider and stock.
Return chicken to pan; simmer until fully cooked, ~30–35 min.
Finish with fresh thyme.

title: Eggplant Involtini (V)
steps: Roast eggplant slices until tender.
Mix ricotta, Parmesan, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Roll cheese mixture into eggplant; place in baking dish with marinara.
Bake at 375°F until heated through; garnish with basil.

title: Roasted Zucchini
steps: Toss zucchini with olive oil, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Roast at 400°F until tender and lightly browned.

title: Glazed Pearl Onions
steps: Sauté onions in butter until lightly browned.
Add sugar and stock; simmer until onions are glazed.

title: Pommes Anna
steps: Layer potato slices in buttered pans; season with salt, pepper, and thyme.
Bake at 400°F until golden and crisp on top, tender inside.

title: Dark Chocolate Marquis
steps: Melt chocolate with butter.
Whip eggs with sugar until pale and fluffy.
Fold chocolate into eggs; gently fold in whipped cream and vanilla.
Chill until set.

title: Smoked Gouda Stuffed Mushrooms (Hot Appetizer, 8 oz)
steps: Remove mushroom stems; sauté stems with garlic.
Mix stems with Gouda, breadcrumbs, parsley.
Fill mushroom caps; drizzle with olive oil.
Bake at 375°F until golden.

title: Grilled Venison Loin, Juniper Jus
steps: Sear venison loins in olive oil; grill to desired doneness.
For jus: sauté juniper berries, deglaze with wine, add stock, reduce by half.
Finish with butter; season.

title: Blackened Red Snapper
steps: Coat fillets with seasoning; sear in hot pan with oil until blackened and cooked through.

title: Sweet Potato & Kale Gratin (V)
steps: Layer sweet potatoes, kale, garlic, cream, and cheese in baking dish.
Bake at 375°F until tender and golden.

title: Charred Okra
steps: Toss okra with oil and salt; grill or sauté until charred.

title: Roasted Beets
steps: Toss beets with oil, salt, and pepper; roast at 400°F until tender.

title: Carolina Gold Rice
steps: Cook rice in stock until tender; finish with butter and season.

title: Pear & Almond Crostata
steps: Roll out dough; spread almond cream.
Layer pear slices; fold edges to form crostata.
Brush with butter and bake at 375°F until golden.

title: Pork Belly Bao (Hot Appetizer, 8 oz)
steps: Steam bao buns until warm and soft.
Fill each bun with pork belly, cucumber, scallions; drizzle with hoisin and sesame oil.

title: Braised Oxtail, Star Anise
steps: Brown oxtail in olive oil; remove.
Sauté aromatics; add wine and stock.
Add oxtail and star anise; braise at 325°F until tender, ~3–4 hours.
Finish with fresh thyme; season.

title: Seared Scallopine of Turkey, Marsala Cream
steps: Sear turkey scallopine in olive oil and butter until golden.
Remove; sauté mushrooms and shallots.
Deglaze with Marsala; reduce by half.
Add cream; return turkey, coat in sauce.

title: Udon Noodles, Miso Butter & Vegetables (V)
steps: Toss butter and miso to create miso butter.
Sauté vegetables lightly; toss with noodles and miso butter.

title: Snow Peas
steps: Sauté or blanch peas; season lightly with oil and salt.

title: Roasted Shiitakes
steps: Toss mushrooms with oil, salt, and pepper; roast at 400°F until browned.

title: Coconut Rice
steps: Simmer rice in milk until tender.
Add coconut milk, sugar, vanilla; cook gently until creamy.

title: Black Sesame Panna Cotta
steps: Heat cream, sugar, and sesame paste; stir until smooth.
Bloom gelatin; incorporate into mixture.
Pour into molds; chill until set.

title: Lobster-Stuffed Mushrooms (Hot Appetizer, 8 oz)
steps: Sauté lobster with butter and garlic.
Mix with breadcrumbs and parsley; fill mushroom caps.
Bake at 375°F until golden.

title: Grilled Ribeye, Bone Marrow Butter
steps: Grill steaks to desired doneness.
Mix bone marrow with butter; serve on top of steak.

title: Seared CHEFS FISH
steps: Sear fish in olive oil until cooked through.
Finish with lemon juice; season.

title: Spinach & Gruyère Soufflé (V)
steps: Make a roux with butter and flour; add milk to make béchamel.
Fold in spinach, cheese, egg yolks, and seasoning.
Whip egg whites; fold gently into mixture.
Bake at 375°F until puffed and golden.

title: Roasted Cauliflower
steps: Toss cauliflower with oil, salt, pepper; roast at 400°F until golden.

title: Haricots Verts
steps: Blanch; sauté lightly with butter and salt.

title: Truffle Mashed Potatoes
steps: Boil potatoes; mash with butter and cream.
Finish with truffle oil; season.

title: Chocolate Hazelnut Torte
steps: Melt chocolate with butter; whisk in sugar and eggs.
Fold in hazelnuts; bake at 350°F until set.

title: Spicy Calamari, Citrus Aioli (Hot Appetizer, 8 oz)
steps: Sauté calamari with oil, garlic, red pepper flakes until cooked.

title: Lamb Shank, Braising Jus
steps: Brown lamb shanks in oil; remove.
Sauté aromatics; add wine and stock.
Return lamb; braise at 325°F until tender, ~3–4 hrs.
Finish with fresh thyme; season.

title: Wild Rice–Stuffed Acorn Squash (V)
steps: Roast squash halves until tender.
Sauté onions and mushrooms; mix with cooked rice and butter.
Stuff squash; finish in oven at 375°F until heated.

title: Braised Celeriac
steps: Sauté celeriac in butter; add stock and thyme.
Simmer until tender.

title: Roasted Mushrooms
steps: Toss mushrooms with oil, salt, pepper; roast at 400°F until golden.

title: Garlic Orzo
steps: Cook orzo in stock until tender; finish with garlic, butter, and season.

title: Blood Orange Tart
steps: Roll dough; bake blind until lightly golden.
Fill with blood orange curd; chill until set.

title: Cheddar & Chive Popovers (Hot Appetizer, 8 oz)
steps: Whisk eggs and milk; fold in flour, melted butter, salt, and chives.
Fold in shredded cheddar.
Pour batter into greased muffin tins or popover molds; bake at 400°F until puffed and golden.

title: Roasted Beef Tenderloin
steps: Rub tenderloin with olive oil, garlic, rosemary, salt, and pepper.
Roast at 425°F to desired doneness (~130–135°F internal for medium rare).
Rest 10 minutes before slicing.

title: Maple-Glazed Salmon
steps: Mix maple syrup, mustard, and olive oil to make glaze.
Brush salmon; bake or sear until just cooked through.

title: Savory Bread Pudding with Leeks (V)
steps: Sauté leeks in butter until soft; cool slightly.
Whisk eggs, milk, cream, salt, and pepper.
Toss bread, leeks, and cheese; pour custard over.
Bake at 375°F until set and golden.

title: Buttered Peas
steps: Blanch peas; toss with butter and salt.

title: Roasted Parsnips
steps: Toss parsnips with oil, salt, and pepper; roast at 400°F until caramelized.

title: Creamy Sundried Tomato Polenta
steps: Cook polenta in water or stock until tender.
Stir in butter, cream, sundried tomatoes, and Parmesan; season.

title: Bourbon Bread Pudding
steps: Whisk eggs, milk, cream, sugar, bourbon, and vanilla.
Toss with bread cubes; bake at 350°F until golden and set.
